productDisplayName: FILA Men Ventaggio White Sports Shoes
description: Perfect for Sports lovers, the fila Ventaggio offers absolute cushioned comfort without compromising on style. With its great looks and comfort wear, it also makes for a great everyday shoe.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations and mesh around the collar for breathable comfortPadded and meshed tongue and collar for all-day breathable, snug comfortLace-up system for a customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for all-day sweat-free cushioned comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone pattern grooves for ultimate grip and tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the footshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
